$description: Component tokens for the Avatar Group component, which displays multiple avatars in an overlapping horizontal stack with an optional count indicator showing additional members. Figma Reference: Node ID 26683-72318

$component.name: Avatar Group
$component.description: A composite component that displays multiple user avatars in a horizontal overlapping stack. Commonly used to show team members, collaborators, or participants in a compact space.
$component.structure: Horizontal layout with avatars overlapping from left to right, with optional '+N' count badge at the end

sizes.xs: 24px avatars - Minimal size for dense layouts
sizes.sm: 32px avatars - Compact size for lists and cards
sizes.md: 40px avatars - Standard size for most use cases
sizes.lg: 48px avatars - Larger for emphasis or section headers

variants.with-count: Shows a count badge (+N) for additional members not displayed
variants.without-count: Shows only the visible avatars without count indicator

usage.contexts: Project collaborators, team members, document viewers, meeting participants, shared access lists
usage.maxVisible: Typically shows 3-5 avatars before using count indicator
usage.overlap: Avatars overlap by a percentage of their width for compact display

container.$comment: Main wrapper container - horizontal flex layout with overlapping avatars

direction.description: Avatar group uses horizontal layout with left-to-right stacking

spacing.$comment: Negative margin creates overlap effect - smaller values = more overlap

xs.description: Overlap amount for xs avatars - negative margin for overlap effect

sm.description: Overlap amount for sm avatars - negative margin for overlap effect

md.description: Overlap amount for md avatars - negative margin for overlap effect

lg.description: Overlap amount for lg avatars - negative margin for overlap effect

default.description: Default maximum number of avatars to show before using count indicator

avatar.$comment: Individual avatar styling within the group

xs.description: Border width for xs avatars - 2px (creates separation between overlapping avatars)

light.description: White border for avatars on light backgrounds

dark.description: Dark border for avatars on dark backgrounds

xs.description: Border radius for xs avatars - full circle

sm.description: Border radius for sm avatars - full circle

md.description: Border radius for md avatars - full circle

lg.description: Border radius for lg avatars - full circle

z-index.$comment: Stacking order - first avatar has highest z-index, decreasing for each subsequent avatar

decrement.description: Amount to decrease z-index for each subsequent avatar

count-badge.$comment: Count indicator showing number of additional members (+N)

hover.description: Background color for count badge on hover

xs.description: Border width for xs count badge - 2px

sm.description: Border width for sm count badge - 2px

md.description: Border width for md count badge - 2px

lg.description: Border width for lg count badge - 4px

light.description: White border for count badge on light backgrounds

dark.description: Dark border for count badge on dark backgrounds

xs.description: Full circle border radius for xs count badge

sm.description: Full circle border radius for sm count badge

md.description: Full circle border radius for md count badge

lg.description: Full circle border radius for lg count badge

xs.description: Size for xs count badge - 24px (matches xs avatar)

sm.description: Size for sm count badge - 32px (matches sm avatar)

md.description: Size for md count badge - 40px (matches md avatar)

lg.description: Size for lg count badge - 48px (matches lg avatar)

default.description: Text color for count badge - gray-700

hover.description: Text color for count badge on hover

xs.description: Typography for xs count badge - 8px semibold

sm.description: Typography for sm count badge - 11px semibold

md.description: Typography for md count badge - 14px semibold

lg.description: Typography for lg count badge - 16px semibold

format.description: Format string for count badge text (e.g., +5)

z-index.description: Z-index for count badge (lower than avatars so it appears at the back)

interaction.$comment: Interaction states when avatar group or individual avatars are clickable

transform.description: Slight scale up on avatar hover

z-index-boost.description: Z-index boost for hovered avatar to bring it to front

transform.description: Slight scale up on count badge hover

default.description: Default cursor for non-interactive avatar group

tooltip.$comment: Tooltip configuration for showing member names on hover

enabled.description: Whether to show tooltips on avatar hover

container.description: ARIA role for avatar group container

format.description: Format for ARIA label describing the group
